title: aeollanthus myrianthus subsp. gamwelliae
intro: Aeollanthus myrianthus subsp. gamwelliae, also known as Gamwell's Aeollanthus, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its antimalarial, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, allowing its medicinal compounds to be extracted and utilized in traditional medicine practices.
